title: Top 5 flexi cap mutual funds to consider for SIP in a volatile market
summary: Flexi cap funds are types of equity mutual funds that invest at least 65% of their collected money in equity and related instruments. They invest across large-cap, mid-cap, and small-cap stocks.

title: I gave ChatGPT a ₹10,000 budget for a summer trip — Here’s whether It chose Goa or Puducherry
summary: Goa is ideal for energetic group vacations with nightlife and beach activities, while Puducherry offers affordability and relaxation. Goa's costs range ₹10,000- ₹12,000, whereas Puducherry can fit within ₹8,000- ₹10,000, making it suitable for budget-conscious travelers seeking a peaceful experience

title: Gold, silver prices today: Check retail rates of 24K, 22K gold, 999 silver on 24 May in Delhi, Mumbai and Kolkata
summary: On May 24, gold prices in India remained stable with 24-karat gold at ₹159,340 per 10 grams. Silver prices also showed limited movement. The MCX is closed on weekends, affecting live trading rates.

title: Ladli Behna Yojana: Can married, salaried women and government employees apply? Check income limits, eligibility
summary: Madhya Pradesh's Ladli Behna Yojana offers ₹1,250 monthly to over 1.25 crore women. Government employees are ineligible, while salaried women in private jobs can apply if their family income is below ₹2.5 lakhs. The scheme promotes women's economic empowerment since its launch in June 2023.

title: I asked ChatGPT which SIP frequency gives the highest return — Daily, monthly or quarterly? Here’s what I learnt
summary: Investing through SIPs, it's essential to prioritize consistency and cash flow over frequency. Monthly SIPs are preferred for their efficiency and discipline, offering similar long-term returns as daily SIPs, while quarterly SIPs may underperform due to longer idle periods before investment.

title: How much should you invest in US equities? Expert warns against going overboard | Here's ideal allocation strategy
summary: US-focused funds have outperformed Indian equities over the past decades, raising questions on allocation. Abhishek Kumar warns against excessive investment in US equities, advocating for a 5-15% allocation for diversification while noting the risks and tax implications for Indian investors.

title: The most honest market advice right now: ‘I don’t know’
summary: As markets grapple with war, oil shocks and uncertainty, the temptation to forecast grows. But the most valuable advice may still be the simplest: stay invested and admit what no one knows.

title: NPS withdrawal rules 2026: how the new Retirement Income Scheme works
summary: PFRDA’s new NPS Retirement Income Scheme lets retirees keep non-annuitized corpus invested and withdraw it gradually till age 85. Here is what you need to know about the two withdrawal options and how to choose between them.

title: Bank holiday next week: SBI, HDFC, others closed on these days between 25 and 31 May; check here
